output.content: {"signals": [{"signal": "Instinct MI350 Series Expansion", "why_it_matters": "AMD is pushing deeper into enterprise AI data centers with higher-density accelerators, creating new buying triggers for training and inference clusters.", "recommended_action": "Prepare data center AI roadmap talking points and workload-fit questions for the next customer meeting."}, {"signal": "Data Center Revenue Growth", "why_it_matters": "Strong financial momentum in data center suggests budget availability for platform expansion and multi-rack AI deployments.", "recommended_action": "Position proposals as phased cluster rollouts tied to measurable workload milestones."}, {"signal": "Cloud Ecosystem Partnerships", "why_it_matters": "Expanded hyperscaler collaboration strengthens AMD's CPU + GPU + software narrative and may influence technical evaluation criteria.", "recommended_action": "Coordinate with solutions engineering on reference architectures and ROCm portability proof points."}]}
